title: Hyderabadi Thali
description: A traditional Indian thali recipe from the city of Hyderabad. This dish combines the flavors of the region with a variety of vegetables and ham.

ingredients.name: Mixed Vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as carrots, potatoes, and peas

instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the mixed vegetables and cook until tender.
In a separate pan, heat ghee over medium heat.
Add the Hyderabadi ham curry and cook until heated through.
Serve the basmati rice with the vegetables and curry.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve with charred naan on the side.
For the crunchy raita, mix yogurt with cucumber, cumin, and coriander.
For the Indian cucumber salad, mix cucumber with cumin, coriander, and cilantro.
Serve the salads on the side with the thali.
